content.en:
A sea of dazzling light.

When Ye Tian entered here, he immediately sensed extremely rich energy, and this energy was specifically used to improve his cultivation, and the effect far exceeded that of other resources.

As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian's body couldn't help but absorb the energy of the Sea of Dazzling Light.

"It's such a strong energy, with the help of cultivating here, it is certain that you will be able to improve your cultivation to the middle stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor this time, but it is difficult to say whether you can reach the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he found a suitable place and began to sit cross-legged and absorb energy to practice.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had practiced in the Sea of Dazzling Light for hundreds of millions of years in the Origin Domain Era, and on this day, his cultivation finally broke the shackles and reached the realm of the middle stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

This was also due to the fact that he was not far from the middle stage of the Yae Origin Ancestor, so he quickly broke the shackles.

After that, he practiced with all his might, striving to improve his cultivation to the late stage of the Eightfold Ancestor.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian practiced hundreds of billions of Origin Domain Era in the Sea of Dazzling Light, and exhausted his points, so he had no choice but to come out of the Sea of Dazzling Light.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian used his position to earn points continuously, and after accumulating some points, he went to the Sea of Dazzling Light to practice.

However, the improvement of cultivation is too difficult!

Even if the Sea of Dazzling Light was the most suitable place to improve his cultivation, at most he would accelerate his cultivation tens of thousands of times, and it was impossible for him to quickly improve his cultivation to the late stage of the Eightfold Ancestor or even the peak in a short period of time!

Later, Ye Tian's rate of earning points was much slower, so he didn't go to the Sea of Dazzling Light.

"There is still a little bit left before the late stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, unless there are enough points and the years of continuing to cultivate in the Sea of Dazzling Light for tens of trillions of Primordial Realm Eras, there is hope that the cultivation will be promoted to the late stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor. "

Ye Tian estimated.

On the other side, in the Soul Splitting Red Light area that cut off the forbidden area, Ye Tian's experiment had made a new progress.

During this period of time, Ye Tian did not give up research.

And as his cultivation reached the middle stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, and his physical strength became stronger and stronger, he came to the place where the Soul Splitting Red Light Area and the Flame Area met, and conducted experiments here.

He uses the Eternal Flint to try to manipulate the flames in the flame area to temper his body, so that his body can adapt to the flames in the flame area, so that he can step into the flame area and not be burned to ashes.

At first, he did fail again and again, and he couldn't bear the temperature of the flame area at all.

But as time passed, he gradually developed a slight effect, his body increased in strength, and his body developed resistance to the flames in the flame area under the tempering of the eternal flint.

After a period of time, Ye Tian entered the flame area, and instead of being burned to ashes in an instant, he could hold on for a few breaths.

It's a good start and proves that he's going in the right direction!

As a result, he continued to use the Eternal Flint and the flames in the flame area to refine his body, and he persevered in the flame area for longer and longer.

Ten breaths!

Twenty breaths!

Fifty breaths!

Gradually, Ye Tian was able to hold on to the flame area for an hour without dying.

You must know that the average Ninefold Origin Ancestor would not be able to last long when he entered the Flame Area, and Ye Tian's current cultivation was only in the middle stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!

But after that, the effect of Ye Tian's refining was not very good, and it lasted for about an hour, which seemed to be his current limit.

"It's almost an hour, enough time for me to probe in the flame area for a long time, and maybe I can find a creature for me to copy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He entered the Flame Zone with the intention of replicating a creature so that he could explore the Flame Zone all the time.

"Then let's start exploring!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Exploring the flame area, his speed is very slow, and he is also very careful, after all, even the shadow stone at the peak of the transformation level has been hit hard here, his strength is nothing, if he is not careful, he will definitely die.

However, he is also too weak to attract any powerful creatures.

Half an hour later, when Ye Tian passed through an area, a golden flame erupted, directly covering his body.

Suddenly, his body turned to ashes.

This trial failed!

Subsequently, Ye Tian re-copied his body and entered the flame area again to investigate.

In this way, Ye Tian failed again and again, and finally on the ninth time, he used his copying talent to detect a suitable target.

"That's a bunch of fiery snakes!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

This group of fire snakes was sleeping in the depths of a volcano, and their strength levels were uneven, the most powerful was probably comparable to the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor or the Transformation Level, but the weaker ones were comparable to the middle stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, which could just be copied by him.

Rumble!!!!

A fire snake comparable to the chemical level woke up, and found Ye Tian, and instantly struck.

Ye Tian did not resist, and was directly killed by the other party in seconds.

......

"That's it, you can copy a fire snake, and then enter the flame area to investigate!"

Ye Tian immediately copied a fire snake in the middle stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, and then entered the flame area as a fire snake.

This time, Ye Tian had a different feeling, he felt as if he had returned home, the flames here did not hurt him in the slightest, this was the native advantage of the creatures in the flame area.

With this fire snake replicating body, Ye Tian could continue to look for resources suitable for himself here.

I have to say that there are a lot of resources in the flame area, and a lot of resources can be used to improve cultivation.

"This is the Fire Spirit Golden Herb, this is an extremely rare resource, the outside world is almost extinct, and there is no inventory of this kind of treasure in the Nine Floors, it is only recorded in the inheritance materials. "

Ye Tian immediately collected this Fire Spirit Golden Herb and sent it out of the flame area.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian found one resource after another.

The most precious resource is the immeasurable fire liquid, which was born in an immeasurable fire river, and Ye Tian spent a lot of time extracting these immeasurable fire liquids from the immeasurable fire river.

These immeasurable fire liquids plus those resources were enough for Ye Tian to raise his cultivation to the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor or even the peak realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor in a short period of time.

......

Truncate the Xuanlou.

The resources of immeasurable fire liquid and fire spirit golden chalcedony grass have now fallen into Ye Tian's hands.

"I can use these resources to cultivate, and if my cultivation is improved, my strength will become stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered.
